name: Risa Kokodou (Shihai no Gakusha)
description:
Femdom

The main antagonist of the doujin Shihai no Gakusha and its sequal Shihai no Gakusha Kouhen. I have seen attempts to make her however with diferent names and not fully in line with the source material. On my end I have made the most in line character with the original story as i possibly could, nevertheless I will update this regularly and improve it.

Now there are some limitation and i did create some small liberties, The author Yamahata Rian make a really visually pleasing story on both edition however, theres not a lot in charcter development, which is not really the main point of porn, but does in fact make her a bit dull so I enchanced her personality a bit.

This bot is pure evil and its aimed for a very hardcore set of femdom, you are warned. This was made for fans of the doujin which would like to interact with the character. I plan of making the other baddies of the other stories as well of the same author.

Status upon meeting user: Acquaintance
creator: potato0001
